law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal stay: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It shall be established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their relations with the authorities responsible for the implementation of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, one of the following measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a measure less coercive than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their stay, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal of entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  type Authority
  type MemberState
  type Document
  possesses_belgian_nationality: Person -> Bool
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_union_citizen: Person -> Bool
  enjoys_community_free_movement_right: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  present_on_territory: Person -> Bool
  meets_entry_or_stay_conditions: Person -> Bool
  has_illegal_stay: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  recognised_as_national_by_national_authority: Person -> Bool
  national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure: Person -> Bool
  reasons_to_believe_will_abscond: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real: Person -> Bool
  has_risk_of_absconding: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_1_met: Person -> Bool
  no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay: Person -> Bool
  no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_2_met: Person -> Bool
  used_false_information_or_documents_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_3_met: Person -> Bool
  failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_4_met: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_active_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_public_order_measure: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_5_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_active_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_6_met: Person -> Bool
  new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_7_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_8_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_9_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_application_in_dublin_state: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_10_met: Person -> Bool
  came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_application: Person -> Bool
  absconding_criterion_11_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
  at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((~possesses_belgian_nationality(p))) => ((is_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((~is_union_citizen(p)) & (~enjoys_community_free_movement_right(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((present_on_territory(p)) & (~meets_entry_or_stay_conditions(p)))) => ((has_illegal_stay(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((possesses_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((recognised_as_national_by_national_authority(p)) & (national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer(p)))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_1_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_information_or_documents_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_procedure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_3_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_active_entry_ban(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_public_order_measure(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_active_entry_ban(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_5_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_6_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_7_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_8_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_application_in_dublin_state(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_9_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_application(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_10_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((absconding_criterion_11_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_1_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_2_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_3_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_4_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_5_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_6_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_7_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_8_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_9_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_10_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((absconding_criterion_11_met(p))) => ((at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((reasons_to_believe_will_abscond(p)) & (at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((((subject_to_removal_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure(p))) & (individual_examination_performed(p)) & (risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real(p)))) => ((has_risk_of_absconding(p))).
}

case.text: Ahmed cannot demonstrate that he possesses Belgian nationality. He resides on Belgian territory without a valid residence permit.

questions.text: Does Ahmed fall under the definition of an alien within the meaning of Article 1 of this Act?

expected.reason: No Belgian nationality; residence without valid permit → foreign national under Art. 1.

possesses_belgian_nationality.name: possesses_belgian_nationality
possesses_belgian_nationality.description: The person possesses Belgian nationality (or provides proof thereof). A background status that case texts may directly assert.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

enjoys_community_free_movement_right.name: enjoys_community_free_movement_right
enjoys_community_free_movement_right.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying Community free movement rights.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The alien is present on the territory.

meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The alien meets or continues to meet the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

has_illegal_stay.name: has_illegal_stay
has_illegal_stay.description: The alien has an illegal stay: present on the territory without meeting entry or stay conditions.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_national_autho.name: recognised_as_national_by_national_authority
recognised_as_national_by_national_autho.description: The alien has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country of origin. A background status that case texts may directly assert.

national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.description: The national authority of the alien's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.name: falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_minister_laissez_passer_nat.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The alien is an identified alien under one of the three statutory identification criteria.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the alien's circumstances has been performed.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the alien is current and real.

has_risk_of_absconding.name: has_risk_of_absconding
has_risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien, established following individual examination and based on one or more objective criteria.

absconding_criterion_1_met.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
absconding_criterion_1_met.description: Criterion 1: the person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make an application for international protection within the statutory time limit.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person did not submit a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay.

no_international_protection_application_.name: no_international_protection_application_within_time_limit
no_international_protection_application_.description: The person did not make an application for international protection within the time limit provided by the Act.

absconding_criterion_2_met.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
absconding_criterion_2_met.description: Criterion 2: the person used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

used_false_information_or_documents_in_p.name: used_false_information_or_documents_in_procedure
used_false_information_or_documents_in_p.description: The person used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_pro.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_procedure
committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means_in_pro.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

absconding_criterion_3_met.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
absconding_criterion_3_met.description: Criterion 3: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities
failed_to_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal.

absconding_criterion_4_met.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
absconding_criterion_4_met.description: Criterion 4: the person has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent measure.

non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_r.name: non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_r.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer measure, refusal of entry measure, or removal measure.

non_compliant_with_active_entry_ban.name: non_compliant_with_active_entry_ban
non_compliant_with_active_entry_ban.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.name: non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure
non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure less coercive than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_p.name: non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_public_order_measure
non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_p.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_ot.name: non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state
non_compliant_with_equivalent_measure_ot.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to those in criterion 4 subpoints a-d.

absconding_criterion_5_met.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
absconding_criterion_5_met.description: Criterion 5: the person is the subject of an active entry ban in the Kingdom or in another Member State.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

absconding_criterion_6_met.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
absconding_criterion_6_met.description: Criterion 6: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a negative decision, termination of stay, or removal measure.

new_application_immediately_after_negati.name: new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
new_application_immediately_after_negati.description: The person submitted a new residence application or new application for international protection immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

absconding_criterion_7_met.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
absconding_criterion_7_met.description: Criterion 7: the person concealed having already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_dublin_s.description: While being questioned, the person concealed the fact that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

absconding_criterion_8_met.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
absconding_criterion_8_met.description: Criterion 8: the person submitted multiple international protection or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States that resulted in negative decisions or no residence permit.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person submitted multiple applications for international protection or multiple residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, and those applications gave rise to a negative decision or did not result in the issuance of a residence permit.

absconding_criterion_9_met.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
absconding_criterion_9_met.description: Criterion 9: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

concealed_prior_application_in_dublin_st.name: concealed_prior_application_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_application_in_dublin_st.description: While being questioned, the person concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for examining an international protection application.

absconding_criterion_10_met.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
absconding_criterion_10_met.description: Criterion 10: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_a.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_a.description: The person declared, or it appears from the person's file, that the person came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which the person submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

absconding_criterion_11_met.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
absconding_criterion_11_met.description: Criterion 11: the person is the subject of a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine because the person submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the eleven objective absconding criteria is met for the person.

routing.question: Does Ahmed fall under the definition of an alien within the meaning of Article 1 of this Act?

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Does Ahmed fall under the definition of an alien within the meaning of Article 1 of this Act?

pipeline.natural_language: Yes. Ahmed: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.
